plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Kit de UI de producto: UX (ui-ux-pro-max), gusto (frontend-design), auditoria (impeccable), motion (design-motion-principles), texto (stop-slop), video Remotion (remotion-best-practices).

plugins.name: backend
plugins.description: Scaffolding de backend .NET (Clean Architecture + CQRS): vertical slices end-to-end con tus convenciones.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Decision/razonamiento: la skill llm-council corre una decision con tradeoffs por un consejo de 5 asesores (analisis en paralelo + peer review anonimo + sintesis de un chairman).

plugins.name: discipline
plugins.description: Disciplina de desarrollo (3 skills de obra/superpowers, MIT): test-driven-development (TDD estricto red-green-refactor + anti-patterns), systematic-debugging (causa raiz antes de fixes) y verification-before-completion (evidencia antes de declarar algo hecho).
